task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and avoid unrelated same-file symbols.

issue.title: Stale analysis after repository rebuild
issue.body: After a rebuild is triggered through api/services.py, the service still returns a stale analysis object. Do not include delete_share_token: that share-token cleanup helper appears in logs from a different request and should not be treated as part of this failure.

comments.body: The view and repository clone helpers are only request plumbing; the bug is in the analysis service path.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
